overview: Mono Red Pingers is a fast, aggressive Pauper archetype that floods the board with cheap one-toughness creatures to apply relentless pressure. It leverages signature threats like Kessig Flamebreather to deal direct damage on attack, while Wrenn's Resolve enables combat math and card advantage. Finish games quickly with instant-speed burn like Lava Spike before opponents can stabilize.
win_conditions: Dealing combat damage with multiple low-cost creatures
Triggering Kessig Flamebreather's attack ability to reduce opponent life
Closing out games with direct damage spells like Lava Spike

keep_criteria: Hands with turn-one or turn-two creature plays
Curves that include cheap removal or burn spells
Multiple one-mana creatures to establish early board presence
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking early plays or curve disruption
Draws with only high-cost cards or no interaction
Lack of burn spells to close out games

early_game: Play cheap creatures immediately to establish board presence
Use one-mana threats to force early blockers or go face
Save mana for instant-speed burn to clear blockers or apply pressure
mid_game: Cast Wrenn's Resolve on attacking creatures to push through blockers and draw cards
Trade one-toughness creatures efficiently into larger threats
Use Lava Spike to remove key blockers or reduce opponent life total
late_game: Flood the board with additional cheap threats to overwhelm defenses
Prioritize direct damage spells to finish the game quickly
Maintain pressure to prevent opponents from setting up late-game answers

key_cards.name: Kessig Flamebreather
key_cards.role: Primary attacker and direct damage engine
key_cards.notes: Attack with it every turn to deal one damage to any target, forcing opponents to block inefficiently or take chip damage.

key_cards.name: Wrenn's Resolve
key_cards.role: Combat math and card advantage tool
key_cards.notes: Cast after blockers are declared to boost attackers, ensure combat damage triggers, and draw a card to maintain hand size.

key_cards.name: Lava Spike
key_cards.notes: Hold up mana to clear blockers at instant speed or deal two damage to the opponent to close out games.

sequencing_tips: Declare attackers before casting Wrenn's Resolve to maximize combat damage triggers
Hold up red mana for instant-speed burn to respond to opponent plays
Trade one-toughness creatures into larger blockers to preserve your burn spells for the opponent

matchups.advice: Go wide with cheap creatures and use burn spells to bypass counterspells and life gain.
Race efficiently by using removal on their biggest threats and pushing damage with Flamebreather.
Apply maximum early pressure before they can stabilize with removal or larger creatures.

common_threats: Life gain effects that extend the game
